top_signals.title: Massive Options Bet Rattles Oil Market On Edge Over Iran War - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Massive Options Bet Rattles Oil Market On Edge Over Iran War  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Analysis of Nvidia’s First-Quarter Earnings
top_signals.summary: Nvidia during the Computex conference in Taipei. Photographer: Annabelle Chih/Bloomberg
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: BlackRock Private Credit Fund’s Valuations Are Probed by DOJ
top_signals.summary: Bloomberg's Olivia Fishlow joins Dani Burger and Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Deals." Federal prosecutors are scrutinizing valuation practices at a BlackRock private credit fund, according to people with knowledge of the matter.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Texas, Florida top list of states reporting millions of dollars lost through crypto ATMs
top_signals.summary: In most complaints, victims said they were given detailed information by fraudsters on how to take money from their bank account, where to find a cryptocurrency kiosk and how to send the funds.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: This Bitcoin price model targets ‘conservative’ $255K by year-end
top_signals.summary: Earlier, analysts at Bernstein and BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes also projected Bitcoin to reach new record highs in 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Coal remains competitive for power generation in the central United States
top_signals.summary: In the first four months of 2026, electricity, natural gas, and coal prices suggested continued favorable economics for coal generation in MISO. The dark spread of coal, the difference between the fuel costs for coal-fired generation and the wholesale electricity price, in the Midcontinent Independent System Operator (MISO) region outpaced a similar measure of revenue relative to fuel costs for natural gas-fired generators known as the spark spread.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
